name: picture-lock
description: An AI production studio that argues its way to a locked cut: a creative council directs, a review board inspects every take against standing Craft Law, a codified sound doctrine mixes to broadcast loudness, and the ElevenLabs-native voice stack ships the cut in multiple languages, with a cost receipt for every generation. Born as a b-roll generator; the build proved direction and QC are the product.
author: Mitchell Williams
